description: Inheritance-Merge E2E Tests: Tasks 3, 4, and 5 are complete. tests/cli_e2e_inheritance_merge.rs now includes merge_at_intermediate_combines_base, merge_at_overlay_chains_through_intermediate, and merge_at_consumer_propagates_full_chain with observed downstream-first accumulation semantics (top_level_key 1.0 at intermediate, overlay, and consumer; list order [beta, fnord, alpha] at intermediate and [carrot, fnord, beta, alpha] at overlay and consumer; nested repo order downstream-first). Focused verification for the consumer test passed on first run; ./script/ci passed; a clean rerun of cargo nextest run --features integration-tests still showed only the expected stale apply_succeeds_in_inheritance_merge_delta failure. Task 6 (delete-superseded-test) is next and should remove that stale local-fs smoke test. Design: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-inheritance-merge-e2e-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-inheritance-merge-e2e.md.
session_startup: Run git status and git stash list — expect only context tracking updates as uncommitted changes on feat/inheritance-merge-e2e-20260415-0525

Resume delete-superseded-test as the active task; remove the stale local-fs inheritance smoke test and any now-unused helper/imports
Confirm with user before starting (fresh sessions typically want confirmation)
